plugin.name: YouTubeMusic
plugin.title: YouTube Music
plugin.desc: Browse, search, and stream YouTube Music to your Squeezebox players.
plugin.changes: Added radio/autoplay — when the queue ends, automatically continues with similar tracks based on the last song played. Note: a long-press "Start Radio" action on individual songs was considered but not implemented in favour of the seamless auto-continue approach.
plugin.creator: schmij97
